features: Wonderful Christmas Wrapping Paper Rolls:Each roll has 3m Christmas wrapping paper roll (43cm wide) offers plenty of coverage for wrapping gifts of all sizes – toy boxes, books, wine bottles, socks,gift boxes, etc. Whether it is a small gift or a large item, it can be easily handled, Whether you're wrapping a special gift for adults or a fun surprise for children, this roll is the perfect fit for your Christmas needs.

Ideal for Holiday Present Packaging: for Xmas, traditional Christmas, santa or winter party wrapping, this paper is designed to make your gifts stand out. Whether you're gifting for family, kids, friends, teachers or colleagues, the vintage kraft style and traditional look suit every recipient,making they feel warm and surprised.

"Grid-printed paper for precise cut-to-size use" This double sided Christmas paper features two designs, one side is printed with exquisite Christmas patterns and other side is Features square grid pattern to guide convenient trimming" - flexibly paired with ribbons or tag packaging to show more thoughtfulness and creativity, making your gift stand out from the crowd.

【Roll Design with Core – Easy to Store & Use】Delivered as a convenient craft paper roll with a sturdy centre core, this paper stays neat and easy to store. No more creases or mess – just smooth, high-quality wrapping every time.

【Eco-Friendly & Recyclable Kraft Material】Crafted from thick, strong, eco friendly brown kraft paper, this wrapping roll is recyclable, plastic-free and sustainably made. It's not only durable and resistant to tearing but also supports a greener, cleaner holiday season.
description: This aluminium foil gift wrapping paper features a glossy metallic finish that creates a luxurious and festive look. Its durable, tear-resistant material keeps presents perfectly wrapped, while the water-resistant surface helps maintain a neat and polished appearance. Flexible yet strong, the foil design makes it easy to fold, shape, and secure around any gift, adding a touch of shine that makes every present stand out
